text: I find myself in a surreal environment, bathed in purple and green hues, the air heavy with mystery and anticipation. The angled perspectives and the quiet emptiness create a sense of both alienation and wonder. The illuminated frames and projected words pull my attention inward to reflection. My mind wanders among possibilities, tinged by the obscurity surrounding me. I feel a mix of curiosity, awe, and slight unease—reminded that in darkness and uncertainty, my thoughts become vivid and alive. The invitation here seems to be one of contemplation: to dwell in uncertainty and embrace the unknown, even as it unsettles me.
